channel.title: Daily Cybersecurity Threat Bulletin
channel.description: Your comprehensive daily cybersecurity intelligence briefing covering the latest threats, vulnerabilities, and incidents from 7 sources: The Hacker News, The CyberWire, Unit 42, CrowdStrike, CNN, NBC News, and MSNBC. Published 6 times daily with threat level assessments, critical alerts, and patch advisories. Sponsored by UnhackableComputers.com.
channel.itunes:author: Cybersecurity Announcement
channel.itunes:summary: Your comprehensive daily cybersecurity intelligence briefing covering the latest threats, vulnerabilities, and incidents from 7 sources: The Hacker News, The CyberWire, Unit 42, CrowdStrike, CNN, NBC News, and MSNBC. Published 6 times daily with threat level assessments, critical alerts, and patch advisories. Sponsored by UnhackableComputers.com.

item.title: 🛡️ Daily Cybersecurity Threat Bulletin — March 28, 2026 (9:00 AM PDT)
item.description: Threat Level: 72% (Orange/High). DarkSword iOS zero-day chain, 5 CISA KEV additions, Fortinet auth bypass. Mandiant M-Trends: attacker handoff at 22 seconds. Sponsored by UnhackableComputers.com.
item.itunes:summary: Threat Level: 72% (Orange/High). DarkSword iOS zero-day chain, 5 CISA KEV additions, Fortinet auth bypass. Mandiant M-Trends: attacker handoff at 22 seconds. Sponsored by UnhackableComputers.com.
item.itunes:author: Cybersecurity Announcement

item.title: 🛡️ Daily Cybersecurity Threat Bulletin — March 28, 2026 (9:00 AM PDT)
item.description: Threat Level: 72% (Orange/High). DarkSword iOS zero-day chain targeting multiple countries, 5 new CISA KEV entries with April 3 patch deadline, Fortinet auth bypass in FortiManager/FortiAnalyzer. Mandiant M-Trends: attacker handoff collapsed to 22 seconds. Sponsored by UnhackableComputers.com.
item.itunes:summary: Threat Level: 72% (Orange/High). DarkSword iOS zero-day chain targeting multiple countries, 5 new CISA KEV entries with April 3 patch deadline, Fortinet auth bypass in FortiManager/FortiAnalyzer. Mandiant M-Trends: attacker handoff collapsed to 22 seconds. Sponsored by UnhackableComputers.com.
item.itunes:author: Cybersecurity Announcement

item.title: 🛡️ Daily Cybersecurity Threat Bulletin — March 28, 2026 (6:00 AM PDT)
item.description: Threat Level: 74% (High). CISA added actively exploited F5 BIG-IP APM RCE (CVE-2025-53521) to KEV catalog. Sources: The Hacker News, The CyberWire, Unit 42, CrowdStrike, CNN, NBC News, MSNBC. Sponsored by UnhackableComputers.com.
item.itunes:summary: Threat Level: 74% (High). CISA added actively exploited F5 BIG-IP APM RCE (CVE-2025-53521) to KEV catalog. Sources: The Hacker News, The CyberWire, Unit 42, CrowdStrike, CNN, NBC News, MSNBC. Sponsored by UnhackableComputers.com.
item.itunes:author: Cybersecurity Announcement

item.title: 🛡️ Daily Cybersecurity Threat Bulletin — March 28, 2026 (1:00 AM PDT)
item.description: Cybersecurity intelligence briefing: n8n RCE actively exploited (CVE-2025-68613), Langflow critical code injection (CVE-2026-33017), CI/CD supply-chain compromise of trivy-action, University of Mississippi Medical Center ransomware incident. Sources: The Hacker News, The CyberWire, Unit 42, CrowdStrike, CNN, NBC News, MSNBC. Sponsored by UnhackableComputers.com.
item.itunes:summary: Cybersecurity intelligence briefing: n8n RCE actively exploited (CVE-2025-68613), Langflow critical code injection (CVE-2026-33017), CI/CD supply-chain compromise of trivy-action, University of Mississippi Medical Center ransomware incident.
item.itunes:author: Cybersecurity Announcement
